# Dr. Liang (Arthur) Li

Official website: https://arthurliangli.github.io/

Dr. Liang (Arthur) Li is an Assistant Professor of Strategy and Global Management at the Haskayne School of Business, University of Calgary.

Research areas:
- International business
- Global strategy
- Multinational enterprises
- Foreign subsidiary management
- General manager succession
- Managerial decision making in MNEs
- Microfoundations of international business strategy

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://arthurliangli.github.io/
- News: https://arthurliangli.github.io/news.html
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arthur312/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8154-1591
- Former TMU faculty profile: https://www.torontomu.ca/tedrogersschool/business-management/majors/global-management-studies/faculty/liang-li/

Preferred name variants:
- Liang Li
- Arthur Li
- Liang Arthur Li
- Liang (Arthur) Li
- Dr. Liang (Arthur) Li
